backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing order management system with product catalog, order placement with SMS confirmation via HTTP outcalls, delivery scheduling, order history queries, and order status updates including cancellation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the QR code image replacement task on OrderForm page, linking to frontend file, components, and test ID REQ-33 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing a dairy e-commerce app with Hindi support, warm color theme, order management, WhatsApp integration, and PhonePe QR code payment functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, defining a warm dairy-themed color palette with neutral tones and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for Parwati Dairy App with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining routes for home, products, order form, contact, order history, and delivery schedule pages, all wrapped in Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Responsive layout component with sticky header containing Parwati Dairy logo, Hindi tagline, desktop/mobile navigation for all pages including Order History and Delivery Schedule, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated actors, and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching order history by customer ID and delivery schedule by order ID, with error handling, retry logic, and proper enabled conditions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm dairy-themed color palette (creamy whites, warm oranges, earth tones) for both light and dark modes, plus utility classes for Hindi text rendering.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying Parwati Dairy's location (Hazaribagh, Jharkhand), phone numbers (8553965714, 6205017829), and business information in a card-based layout with icons.
frontend/src/pages/DeliverySchedule.tsx: Displays pending orders (status='placed') for a customer with delivery schedule information, including date/time formatting, loading states, and error handling using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring Parwati Dairy logo, hero section with Hindi tagline, navigation cards for Milk/Paneer/Ghee orders and Contact, plus a features section highlighting product benefits.
frontend/src/pages/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component with product selection (Milk ₹60/L, Paneer ₹400/kg, Ghee ₹1500/kg), real-time total calculation, form validation, and WhatsApp order submission with PhonePe UPI payment integration for mobile devices.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistory.tsx: Displays customer order history with status badges (placed/delivered/canceled), date formatting from bigint timestamps, loading skeletons, and error handling using React Query hooks for customer ID 1.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products page component displaying three dairy products (Milk, Paneer, Ghee) with prices, descriptions, Hindi names, and 'Order Now' buttons that navigate to the order form with pre-selected product.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Utility function to format order data and open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message to phone number 918553965714 for order submission.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, Hindi font support (Noto Sans Devanagari), custom shadows, animations, and responsive container settings.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (home, products, order form, WhatsApp integration, contact page) and known issues (order history errors, QR code mobile issues, missing total calculation).
